prompt: A heroic high-fantasy anime illustration of an elf knight woman marching through a stone city gate during a public celebration, full-body low-angle view, centered composition. She has long flowing golden blonde hair, pointed elf ears, and an elegant athletic build. Her face is mostly obscured by the angle and raised arm. She raises a long ornate silver sword straight upward in her right hand in a triumphant salute, while her left arm hangs naturally by her side. She wears intricate polished silver plate armor over a short forest green dress, with engraved breastplate, armored gauntlets, layered fauld and tassets, leather belts and straps at the waist, and decorated knee-high armored boots. A dark green cape billows dramatically behind her. A sheathed secondary sword hangs at her hip. She is walking forward confidently like a beloved champion responding to the cheers of the people. Around her, exactly 2 lines of townspeople and elf citizens stand on both sides of the street, raising hands and celebrating her passage. Behind her is a large medieval stone archway with carved ornament and exactly 3 visible green banners bearing pale emblem designs, plus weathered walls and hints of towers beyond. The sky is a vivid deep blue with large sunlit white clouds. White flower petals drift through the air across the whole scene. Warm daylight, cinematic rim light, detailed fabric and armor reflections, dynamic perspective, painterly anime rendering, highly detailed fantasy background, festive heroic atmosphere.
